diagnoses.name: Severe sepsis with septic shock
diagnoses.evidence_span: other specified sepsis progressing to severe sepsis with septic shock

diagnoses.name: Acute pancreatitis
diagnoses.evidence_span: acute pancreatitis with peripancreatic fluid collection

diagnoses.name: Metabolic acidosis
diagnoses.evidence_span: Metabolic acidosis was present with pH 7.21 and base deficit of -8

diagnoses.name: Wet beriberi with polyneuropathy
diagnoses.evidence_span: evidence of wet beriberi with polyneuropathy related to chronic alcohol dependence

diagnoses.name: Alcoholic hepatitis
diagnoses.evidence_span: Alcoholic hepatitis without ascites documented on clinical and laboratory grounds

diagnoses.name: Hypothyroidism
diagnoses.evidence_span: Chronic conditions including hypertensive chronic kidney disease, alcoholic hepatitis, hypothyroidism, gout

diagnoses.name: Gout
diagnoses.evidence_span: Chronic conditions including hypertensive chronic kidney disease, alcoholic hepatitis, hypothyroidism, gout

diagnoses.name: Asthma
diagnoses.evidence_span: History of tobacco use and asthma also documented

diagnoses.name: History of venous thromboembolism
diagnoses.evidence_span: Patient has had prior venous thromboembolic events

diagnoses.name: History of bariatric surgery
diagnoses.evidence_span: Prior bariatric surgery status relevant to nutritional needs

procedures.name: Percutaneous central venous catheter insertion
procedures.evidence_span: Percutaneous central venous catheter (Infusion Device into Superior Vena Cava) placed for hemodynamic monitoring and medication administration

medications.name: Heparin
medications.evidence_span: Heparin 5,000 units SC BID (VTE prophylaxis given history)

medications.name: Thiamine
medications.evidence_span: Thiamine 100 mg PO daily and thiamine 500 mg IV daily (beriberi treatment)

medications.evidence_span: Vitamin B complex 1 cap PO/NG daily

medications.evidence_span: Multivitamins with minerals 1 tab PO daily

medications.evidence_span: Magnesium oxide 400 mg PO/NG daily and magnesium sulfate 4 gm IV (repletion)

medications.name: Lorazepam
medications.evidence_span: Lorazepam 1-0.5 mg PO/NG for anxiety/alcohol withdrawal
